case_title: CAPTIAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A., VS. DAN W SONGER ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-21-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPTIAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A., RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SONGER, DAN W $8,527.58 PRINCIPAL, $395.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,922.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200014563)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $395.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200014563) AS TO DEFENDANT SONGER, DAN W

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200008721), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPTIAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A., SERVED MAR-08-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SONGER, DAN W

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-01-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
